full_text:
Hou Cheng 侯成
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hou Cheng (侯成). Cavalry commander under Lü Bu. Defected to Cao Cao. Hou Cheng was affiliated with Lu Bu and the Wei Kingdom. Hou Cheng lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
